title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 630.545 - Board and living quarters for employees of facilities
text:
630.545.  Board and living quarters for employees of facilities. — In addition to salary and wages, when the director shall determine that it is in the best interest of the state to do so, the department may provide any employee in any institution under its control with board and living quarters on the grounds of its facilities.
(L. 1980 H.B. 1724)
